CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, content String);

INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Das ist ein Teststring für overlayUTF8 Funktion.'), (2, 'Dieser String wird zum Testen verwendet.'), (3, 'Ein weiteres Beispiel für die Funktion.'), (4, 'Ein Beispielsatz, der modifiziert wird.');
SELECT overlayUTF8(content, 'NEUER TEXT', 10) AS result FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT overlayUTF8(content, 'TEST', 5, 4) AS result FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT overlayUTF8(content, 'äußeren', -9) AS result FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT overlayUTF8(content, 'EIN anderer', 1, 3) AS result FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT overlayUTF8(content, 'XYZ', 27, 20) AS result FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4;
SELECT id, overlayUTF8(content, 'OVERLAY', -11, 5) AS modified FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT id, overlayUTF8(content, '', 1, 5) AS clear FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT overlayUTF8((SELECT content FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2), 'VERÄNDERT', 12) AS nested_result;
SELECT id, overlayUTF8(content, '!!!', position, length) AS noisy FROM (SELECT id, 15 AS position, 5 AS length FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1) AS t JOIN test_strings USING (id);
